info.name: DataServiceAPI
info.description: version=1.0 - AI-generated mock examples for DataServiceAPI

body.raw: {"query":"query dsModel($model: String) { dsModel(model: $model) { name defaultVersion } }","variables":{"model":"example"}}

{"query":"query trendingChannels($topN: Int) { trendingChannels(topN: $topN) { tagV2 { hash uuid type recommendedTags { score } recommendedArticles { type contentID rank score } } rank } }","variables":{"topN":1}}
